chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1614/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on Misc. No.7402/2024 2. For order on office objection(s) at “A”. 3. For order on Misc. No.7403/2024 4. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2024 Syed Amir Ali Shah advocate............... 1. Urgency granted. 2 to 4. Since plaintiff has approached civil court and that court vide judgment dated 31.10.2017 and decree dated 02.11.2017 dismissed the suit and he failed to file an appeal. Since he has failed to avail the remedy provided and directly invoked writ jurisdiction praying for exactly the same relief which cannot be granted in writ jurisdiction. Accordingly, petition is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E IK
